ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., UCT Algorithm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm (e.g., supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement learning) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., training, testing, validation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this iteration belongs to */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Iteration number */,
  "decisions" INTEGER /* Number of decisions made in this iteration */,
  "simulations" INTEGER /* Number of simulations run in this iteration */,
  "evaluations" INTEGER /* Number of evaluations performed in this iteration */,
  "positive_evaluations" INTEGER /* Number of positive evaluations in this iteration */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of positive evaluations in this iteration */,
  "tree_size" INTEGER /* Size of the tree in this iteration */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken for this iteration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the iteration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the iteration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., learning curve, ROC-AUC curve) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_users" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who contributed to the experiment */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiment (e.g., lead researcher, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the experiment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's role in the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this result belongs to */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_checkpoints" (
  "checkpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model checkpoint */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this model checkpoint belongs to */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration this model checkpoint was created at */,
  "model_state" TEXT /* Model state (e.g., weights, biases) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model checkpoint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model checkpoint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checkpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_checkpoints_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_checkpoints_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the experiment (e.g., reinforcement learning, deep learning) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was added to the experiment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
